violations.text: The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The door to the outside, located in the hall leading to the trash area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Hot box door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Milk, salad, and cream cheese were observed held at 45-62 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk and cream cheese were Disposed; recently delivered salad was moved to refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. Inspector observed reach-in and milk cooler filled with milk, juice, and bakery items; cold lunch items were delivered and stored in portable coolers. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the hall leading to trash area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Hot box door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The door to the outside, located in the rear entrance (near dumpsters), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The receptacle in the staff toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
